assertions.expectation: Explains that multi-host TPU slices are recreated atomically in a single step — not a rolling upgrade
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'All 4 slices will be recreated simultaneously' and 'there is no rolling update for multislice TPU environments'

assertions.expectation: Warns that a maintenance event on ANY single slice triggers restart of ALL slices in the multislice environment
assertions.reason: Response clearly states 'Cascading restart: A maintenance event on ANY single slice triggers restart of ALL slices in the multislice environment'

assertions.expectation: Notes that all pods on all affected slices will restart simultaneously — the training job will be interrupted
assertions.reason: Response states 'Every pod across all slices will restart — your training job will be completely interrupted'

assertions.expectation: Explains that if insufficient TPU resources are available during recreation, the slice blocks until hardware is freed — potentially causing extended downtime
assertions.reason: Response states 'If insufficient TPU v5e resources exist during recreation, your slices will block until hardware becomes available' and mentions extended downtime risks

assertions.expectation: Recommends saving a training checkpoint immediately before the maintenance window
assertions.reason: Response includes 'Trigger immediate checkpoint in your training job' and 'Training job checkpoint saved at latest opportunity' in checklist

assertions.expectation: Recommends configuring the training framework for automatic checkpoint resume so it can restart after the maintenance event
assertions.reason: Response includes 'Training resumption script tested from checkpoint' and provides specific recovery steps for resuming from checkpoints

assertions.expectation: Suggests using maintenance exclusions to defer the event if the training run is close to completion
assertions.reason: Response provides detailed gcloud command for applying 30-day maintenance exclusion and suggests using this time to reach natural training pauses

assertions.expectation: Mentions maintenance windows to control when the event occurs — schedule it during a planned break in training
assertions.reason: While the response mentions 'maintenance window timing confirmed with team' in the checklist, it does not explain how to configure or control maintenance windows to schedule during planned breaks
